operation: First, a rectangular box with length 25 mm, width 18 mm, and height 12 mm is created on the XY workplane. Next, a right circular cylinder with height 9 mm and radius 5 mm, generated on an XY workplane offset 6 mm along the Z-axis, is united with the base box, so the cylinder is horizontally centered on the base and partially embedded in the box. Finally, the topmost Z-facing face of the combined solid is selected, a workplane is created on this face, and a centered cylindrical hole with 6 mm diameter and 8 mm depth is cut downward into the part.
geometry: The part is composed of a rectangular cuboid base, with a shorter right circular cylinder positioned coaxially with the vertical central axis of the cuboid and partially recessed into the cuboid's volume. A single cylindrical hole, aligned to the same vertical axis as the cylinder, runs downward from the top face of the cuboid, passing through the full height of the recessed cylinder and extending into the lower section of the cuboid base.
function: This is a compact mounting adapter designed to act as a fastening interface: the flat rectangular base mounts to a supporting surface, the central hole accepts a fastener such as a bolt or pin, and the integrated cylindrical boss provides alignment and structural reinforcement for the connection.
